description_long: This is a medium-sized, vintage-style bottle with a tall, narrow neck and a rounded base. The bottle is predominantly dark brown with aged, parchment-like labels affixed to its body and neck, featuring faded text and markings in red and black. A prominent red wax seal is visible on the front, adding to its antique appearance. The neck is capped with a red closure, and the bottle's surface appears slightly matte with some subtle texture, suggesting it is made of glass with decorative elements. The overall design evokes the look of an old apothecary or liquor bottle, suitable for display or practical use. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the bottle appears to be empty.
description: A vintage-style, dark brown bottle with parchment-like labels, a red wax seal, and a red cap. The bottle has an antique look with faded text and decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main label with faded text, a red wax seal, and the red cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the bottle's curvature, partial label, and the red wax seal protruding from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a large, blank parchment label and the smooth, rounded back of the bottle.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights the bottle's tall neck, another large label, and the absence of the wax seal on this side.
attribute_label_or_branding: Faded black and red handwritten-style text on parchment-like labels on the neck and body; no clear brand name visible.
